title: cryptostylis ovata
intro: Cryptostylis ovata, also known as the yellow bird orchid, is a species of orchid found in Australia and New Guinea. It is a type of terrestrial orchid that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Cryptostylis ovata include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
